summary: Full test suite for Saude platform created - Backend API tests (30 passed) and Frontend E2E tests (17 passed). All authentication, symptoms, questionnaire APIs and frontend flows working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: External preview URL shows 'Preview Unavailable'. All tests run against localhost which works correctly.

action_items: External preview URL is unavailable - may need to check Emergent preview service
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest runs are prefixed with TEST_ for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests passed. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/ (pytest), Frontend E2E in /app/tests/e2e/ (Playwright). External preview unavailable - use localhost:3000 for frontend and localhost:8001 for backend. Questionnaire flow: 7 steps -> register -> results -> portal. Auth flow requires completing questionnaire first to access register page.

backend_api.auth_register: POST /api/auth/register - new user, duplicate email, validation
backend_api.auth_login: POST /api/auth/login - valid creds, invalid creds, nonexistent email
backend_api.symptoms_create: POST /api/symptoms - create, update existing, auth required, validation
backend_api.symptoms_get: GET /api/symptoms - list, with days param, by date, auth required

frontend_e2e.homepage: Hero section, CTA buttons, navigation, theme toggle
frontend_e2e.auth_pages: Login page, protected routes redirect, register requires phenotype
frontend_e2e.questionnaire: 7-step flow, selection validation, navigation, complete flow to registration
